# 🚀 Pull Request Template - SAGE OS

## 📋 **PR Information**

### **Type of Change**
<!-- Please check the type of change your PR introduces -->
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Configuration change
- [ ] 🧪 Test addition/modification
- [ ] 🎨 Code style/formatting change
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🔒 Security enhancement
- [ ] 🖥️ Platform-specific change (Windows/Linux/macOS/Raspberry Pi)
- [ ] 🤖 AI/ML integration
- [ ] 🏗️ Build system change

### **Target Platform(s)**
<!-- Check all platforms this PR affects -->
- [ ] 🐧 Linux (x86_64, ARM64)
- [ ] 🍎 macOS (Intel, Apple Silicon)
- [ ] 🪟 Windows (x86, x64)
- [ ] 🍓 Raspberry Pi (ARM64)
- [ ] 🔧 Cross-platform
- [ ] 📱 Embedded systems
- [ ] ☁️ Cloud/CI/CD

### **Architecture Support**
<!-- Check supported architectures -->
- [ ] i386 (32-bit x86)
- [ ] x86_64 (64-bit x86)
- [ ] ARM64 (AArch64)
- [ ] RISC-V
- [ ] Architecture-agnostic

## ✅ **Checklist**

### **Code Quality**
- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes

### **Git Hygiene**
- [ ] I have rebased my branch on the latest main/dev branch
- [ ] My commits are atomic and have descriptive messages
- [ ] I have squashed any "fix" commits
- [ ] No merge commits in the PR (rebased cleanly)

### **Platform Testing**
- [ ] Tested on primary development platform
- [ ] Cross-platform compatibility verified (if applicable)
- [ ] QEMU testing completed for kernel changes
- [ ] Hardware testing completed (if applicable)

### **Documentation & Communication**
- [ ] Documentation has been updated
- [ ] PR title is descriptive and follows conventions
- [ ] PR description is complete and informative
- [ ] Related issues are linked
- [ ] Breaking changes are clearly documented

### **Security & Performance**
- [ ] Security implications have been considered
- [ ] Performance impact has been evaluated
- [ ] Memory leaks have been checked
- [ ] Resource usage is reasonable
